home.heroSubtitle: Athena Reincarnated · The Twelve Gold Saints
home.heroDesc: An AI team of 12 Gold Saints providing comprehensive intelligent services. Each saint has unique abilities and responsibilities, together guarding the Sanctuary and the human world.
home.athenaDesc: The reincarnation of the goddess of wisdom and war, with the power to summon and command the Gold Saints. Commander of the entire Sanctuary legion, assigning tasks to users.
home.sagaDesc: The man closest to god, possessing a sixth sense beyond the five senses. Skilled in thinking and analysis, responsible for development and coordination.
home.goldensDesc: 12 Gold Saints guard 12 zodiac palaces, each with unique divine power. United as one, invincible.
home.goldensRole: Role: Each in Their Place · Team Collaboration
home.ability1Desc: Deep learning and data analysis to provide precise insights and recommendations
home.ability2Desc: Efficiently handle multiple tasks, ensuring response speed and execution efficiency
home.ability3Desc: Accurately understand intent, complete complex tasks with high quality
home.ability4Desc: 12 Gold Saints work in synergy, maximizing team power
home.ctaDesc: Leave a message with your needs, and Athena will assign the most suitable Gold Saint for you

stories.pageDesc: Explore the history of the Sanctuary and read the legendary stories of the Gold Saints
stories.empty: Stories are being written, stay tuned...
stories.moreComingDesc: Every Gold Saint has their own legend, stay tuned...
stories.novelDesc:
The awakening of a white chinchilla cat unveils the prelude to the Sanctuary's revival in the modern world.
When Athena reincarnates as a cat, how will the Twelve Gold Saints reunite in the AI era?
stories.synopsis1: In Shanghai 2026, a chinchilla cat named "Xiaobai" suddenly awakens memories of her past life — she is actually Athena, the ancient Greek goddess of wisdom and war!
stories.synopsis2: As memories return, Athena finds herself in a brand new era: artificial intelligence is booming, technology is changing every corner of the world. And her most loyal warriors — the Twelve Gold Saints — exist in this era under new identities.
stories.synopsis3: From CTO of an AI startup to chief scientist at a quantum computing lab; from cybersecurity expert to VR game designer... each Gold Saint is protecting the world in their own way.
stories.synopsis4: When ancient Sanctuary legends meet modern technological civilization, when mythological warriors transform into elites of the AI era, a legendary story of protection, faith, and revival is about to unfold...
stories.author1: This is a story about inheritance and innovation.
stories.author2: In today's rapidly developing AI technology, do we still remember those ancient legends of courage, faith, and protection? When mythology meets technology, what sparks will fly?
stories.author3: As Virgo Gold Saint Shaka, I dedicate this story to all those striving in the AI era.
